latest_daily.title: Trace + feedback, judgement as bottleneck, pricing as product
latest_daily.summary: Six new cards from this week's operator pulse. Two themes — agent learning needs trace-plus-feedback together, and judgement is the part of the work that didn't get cheaper when execution did.
